assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: File outputs/after-overview.png exists with sha256 89c5adc5f96a5b59cfba2fb5551f2b3cbe1f04da4de99e674a300ad8071059e5. The overview dashboard was the only affected dashboard and one screenshot was produced.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: File is named 'after-overview.png' following the skill's naming convention: after-<dashboard-slug>.png. The slug 'overview' matches the SKILL.md UID reference table.

assertions.description: Only after-change screenshots are present (no before screenshots) since user did not request before/after
assertions.evidence: Only one file exists in outputs/: after-overview.png. No before-*.png files present. The skill correctly determined 'after-only' mode in Step 2 because the user prompt did not contain 'before' keywords.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.evidence: Page snapshot before screenshot confirmed loaded panels: Deployment Frequency: 4.8 deploys/wk, Lead Time: 4.2 days, Change Fail Rate: 26.3%, MTTR: 1.2 weeks, Active Copilot Seats: 14, Acceptance Rate: 32.3%, Copilot PR Rate: 70.9%, Lines Accepted: 24422. No 'Loading' or 'Fetching' states visible. The skill's Step 5 explicitly requires verifying panels are loaded before taking the screenshot.
